title: Wallet - View Master Private Key / Seed

actions.value:
To view / export your Master Private Key for any of your assets in Edge:

 

1. Use the Assets tab at the bottom of the screen after logging into your account

2. Long-press or hold down on the wallet you want to export (alternatively, tap into it and use the ⋮ vertical dots to open this wallet's menu)

3. Locate the option to 'View Master Private Key' - OR - Firstly, 'Go to Parent wallet' for any token wallets.

4. Enter your password to reveal your seed or private key ***

 

*** This information is recommended to be handwritten only. It cannot be copied, and a screenshot is a very insecure  way to store such sensitive information. Please take care.
 

 

Please note that each Asset in your account has a unique, private key or seed phrase. These are all held together and encrypted by your username and password = A better setup than a single seed for all assets 💪📱🔐

 

Be EXTREMELY cautious when copying or exporting your master private seed. Consider this as root-level access to your funds. Every wallet you create in your Edge account has a private key/seed that has never been exposed before, and the security of your Edge account will not be able to protect an exposed seed that's out in the wild.

raw_title: Wallet - View Master Private Key / Seed
